                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Dust lifted from the floor in a fine, lazy drift as if gravity had loosened.\nJhace’s first thought was structural. A brace slip. A terrace shift. A pipe main failing somewhere it shouldn’t.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 500
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 557,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "9afdb76d-8252-4152-a95b-dc30e9a10a20",
                  "cited_message_idx": 43,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    1,
                    11
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 2,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": 2
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The lintel fell harmlessly because the people under it had cleared in that half-breath.\nTiffani didn’t let it become myth. She let it become a list.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 529
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 586,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    4,
                    33
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Jhace stepped into the middle of the lane where the heat line was strongest. He turned his body so he could see both the burning doorway and the steam pipe.\nHe raised both hands.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 558
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 615,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    9,
                    33
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "It should have hit the city like an axe.\nIt didn’t.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 587
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 645,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    38,
                    44
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 1,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 1
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Chapter 10 — Mobel (The Shard)\nMobel didn’t sit in the center of the room.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 616
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 674,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 39,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    1,
                    25
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The hum tightened.\nTiffani felt it before she could name it. The slack phase did not arrive on schedule.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 646
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 704,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    17,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Tiffani hated how effective it was.\nEries turned, finally, toward Corlexi—barely—just enough to include him in her closing.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 675
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 734,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "2f819583-2aa0-46ed-8632-ac0e24f472aa",
                  "cited_message_idx": 35,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    40,
                    44
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 4,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "She didn’t know what would happen next.\nShe only knew this:",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 705
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 951,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "9afdb76d-8252-4152-a95b-dc30e9a10a20",
                  "cited_message_idx": 43,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    23,
                    29
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "On the plain beyond Saint Merro, something had risen.\nAt first his mind tried to name it small. Wall. Cliff. A terrace collapse out beyond the far districts. Then the scale hit and the name fell apart.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 922
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 1167,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    20,
                    36
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Steam rolled across the lane, white and dense, driven in a low sheet straight into the mouth of the building.\nIt hit the heat and exploded into a wall of scalding fog. The flame inside coughed, then shrank. The orange at the windows dimmed, replaced by gray-white boiling.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 1138
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 1287,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    20,
                    29
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 1,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 1
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Her home had been tucked under that bend. Two rooms. One small window that never opened right. Aunt Lessa’s pot hooks by the stove. A shelf with the chipped bowl they kept even though it was stupid to keep a chipped bowl.\nChloen stared at the bend.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 1258
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 1548,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    23,
                    31
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Jhace held his hands out and kept sweeping, smaller motions now, compressing and directing. He wasn’t blowing the fire out. He was smothering it, stripping it of oxygen and drowning it in wet heat.\nHis sternum locked. Breath cut. Vision narrowed.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 1519
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 1576,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 39,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    1,
                    8
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The hum tightened.\nTiffani felt it before she could name it. The slack phase did not arrive on schedule.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 1549
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 1831,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 39,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    1,
                    8
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Guards raised ropes to open lanes. Guards lowered ropes to close lanes.\nCrowds entered by terrace ramps and split at chalk marks into sections. Cloth tabs tied to wrists matched section colors. Red, blue, grey, raw twine.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 1804
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 2043,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    17,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Tiffani hated how effective it was.\nEries turned, finally, toward Corlexi—barely—just enough to include him in her closing.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 2014
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 2261,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "9afdb76d-8252-4152-a95b-dc30e9a10a20",
                  "cited_message_idx": 43,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    1,
                    10
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 2,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": 2
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The lintel fell harmlessly because the people under it had cleared in that half-breath.\nTiffani didn’t let it become myth. She let it become a list.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 2233
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 2462,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    14,
                    28
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The leading edge of the wave kinked sideways as if a blade had cut a groove through it. Foam that had been rushing straight at the city snapped into a new vector, sliding along an invisible plane. The whole mass followed—tons of water re-routing as one body, redirected away from the densest district and forced into the open basin to the left where there was stone and scrub and nothing stacked for people to die in.\nSpray erupted where the redirected water scraped over ground. A new roar rolled up the face, late and heavy, vibrating through the parapet and into Jhace’s sternum like a hand pressing to see if he’d learned.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 2433
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 2660,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 39,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    13,
                    22
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "A worker carrying a crate did not recover.\nHis foot landed on a stone lip that had been stable one beat ago. The lip shifted under the stutter. The crate tilted. His weight followed.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 2631
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 2912,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    38,
                    44
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 1,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 1
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Chapter 10 — Mobel (The Shard)\nMobel didn’t sit in the center of the room.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 2883
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 3098,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "2f819583-2aa0-46ed-8632-ac0e24f472aa",
                  "cited_message_idx": 35,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    21,
                    25
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 1,
                  "retrieval_turn": 4,
                  "search_result_idx": 1
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Chapter 17 — Tiffani (Deployment)\nCamera (baseline): The stadium held a bowl of bodies. Rope lanes cut the stone flats into corridors. Bell towers at three stations rang cadence through metal throats. Registry tables formed a spine under awnings. Water barrels sat in rows. A thin ash haze drifted and then reversed, as the air pulled and slacked.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 3069
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 3342,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    16,
                    21
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "A joint on the steam line hissed, venting a thin ribbon upward.\nHe hooked the shove of wind around that ribbon the way you’d redirect a flow in a pipe—curve it, carry it, throw it where it mattered.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 3313
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 3370,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 39,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    3,
                    7
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 2,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 2
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Her eyes went immediately to the failure pattern.\nShe traced the break line up with her gaze: façade shear, mortar flow point, post-bend, then fracture. It matched her earlier forecast. Liquefaction, set wrong, then catastrophic shear under its own weight.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 3343
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 3882,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 39,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    10,
                    12
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Not an earthquake. Not a ring.\nA discontinuity.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 3853
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 3912,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    23,
                    31
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Jhace held his hands out and kept sweeping, smaller motions now, compressing and directing. He wasn’t blowing the fire out. He was smothering it, stripping it of oxygen and drowning it in wet heat.\nHis sternum locked. Breath cut. Vision narrowed.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 3883
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 4467,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    24,
                    33
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Someone down there had done it.\nSomeone had put a hand on a moving ocean and told it no.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 4438
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 4497,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    23,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Applause started in the bowl—hesitant, then spreading, because people needed an action that wasn’t screaming.\nTiffani watched the applause become consent.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 4468
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 4816,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    23,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Applause started in the bowl—hesitant, then spreading, because people needed an action that wasn’t screaming.\nTiffani watched the applause become consent.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 4787
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 5081,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    9,
                    16
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Eries finished with logistics—routes, station names, brace assignment signals, bell translations. She spoke in lists without sounding like a clerk.\nA woman in the mid-bowl shouted, “Will the sky close?”",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 5053
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 5581,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    49,
                    51
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Chapter 18 — Chloen (Habituation)\nChloen didn’t taste metal anymore.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 5552
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 5769,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "9afdb76d-8252-4152-a95b-dc30e9a10a20",
                  "cited_message_idx": 43,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    23,
                    29
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 6,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "On the plain beyond Saint Merro, something had risen.\nAt first his mind tried to name it small. Wall. Cliff. A terrace collapse out beyond the far districts. Then the scale hit and the name fell apart.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 5740
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 5917,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 39,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    4,
                    6
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "A table line formed behind the platform. Three tables. One for water cups. One for bandage cloth and salve tins. One for names.\nAt the names table, clerks held ledgers and charcoal sticks. A runner stood beside them with a bag of wax tabs. A guard watched the table with a hand on a baton.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 5890
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 5947,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    19,
                    22
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "“Administrator Corlexi will coordinate infrastructure through the Crown stations,” she said. “He will oversee brace crews and grid stabilization.”\nA gift and a leash in one sentence.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 5918
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 6104,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "2f819583-2aa0-46ed-8632-ac0e24f472aa",
                  "cited_message_idx": 35,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    21,
                    25
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 1,
                  "retrieval_turn": 4,
                  "search_result_idx": 1
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Chapter 17 — Tiffani (Deployment)\nCamera (baseline): The stadium held a bowl of bodies. Rope lanes cut the stone flats into corridors. Bell towers at three stations rang cadence through metal throats. Registry tables formed a spine under awnings. Water barrels sat in rows. A thin ash haze drifted and then reversed, as the air pulled and slacked.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 6075
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 6134,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                  "cited_message_idx": 47,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    23,
                    31
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 0,
                  "retrieval_turn": 7,
                  "search_result_idx": 0
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Jhace held his hands out and kept sweeping, smaller motions now, compressing and directing. He wasn’t blowing the fire out. He was smothering it, stripping it of oxygen and drowning it in wet heat.\nHis sternum locked. Breath cut. Vision narrowed.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 6105
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 6318,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    17,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Tiffani hated how effective it was.\nEries turned, finally, toward Corlexi—barely—just enough to include him in her closing.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 6289
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 6604,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "2f819583-2aa0-46ed-8632-ac0e24f472aa",
                  "cited_message_idx": 35,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    21,
                    25
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 1,
                  "retrieval_turn": 4,
                  "search_result_idx": 1
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Chapter 17 — Tiffani (Deployment)\nCamera (baseline): The stadium held a bowl of bodies. Rope lanes cut the stone flats into corridors. Bell towers at three stations rang cadence through metal throats. Registry tables formed a spine under awnings. Water barrels sat in rows. A thin ash haze drifted and then reversed, as the air pulled and slacked.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 6575
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 6894,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [

                  ],

                  "retrieval_file_index": 1,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 1
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Chapter 10 — Mobel (The Shard)\nMobel didn’t sit in the center of the room.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 6865
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 7039,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 39,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    35,
                    40
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 3,
                  "retrieval_turn": 5,
                  "search_result_idx": 3
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "The ledger opened.\nNames began to be taken.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 7010
            },
            {
              "citation_format_type": "berry_file_search",
              "end_ix": 7069,
              "metadata": {
                "extra": {
                  "authors_display": null,
                  "cited_message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                  "cited_message_idx": 51,
                  "cloud_doc_url": null,
                  "doi": null,
                  "journal_homepage_url": null,
                  "journal_name": null,
                  "line_range": [
                    23,
                    24
                  ],
                  "publication_year": "None",
                  "retrieval_file_index": 4,
                  "retrieval_turn": 8,
                  "search_result_idx": 4
                },
                "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
                "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
                "source": "my_files",
                "text": "Applause started in the bowl—hesitant, then spreading, because people needed an action that wasn’t screaming.\nTiffani watched the applause become consent.",
                "type": "file"
              },
              "start_ix": 7040
            }
          ],
          "content_references": [
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 528,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 3,
                "line_range_end": 31,
                "line_range_start": 1,
                "message_id": "9afdb76d-8252-4152-a95b-dc30e9a10a20",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file3L1-L31",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Dust lifted from the floor in a fine, lazy drift as if gravity had loosened.\nJhace’s first thought was structural. A brace slip. A terrace shift. A pipe main failing somewhere it shouldn’t.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 500,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 557,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 2,
                "line_range_end": 11,
                "line_range_start": 1,
                "message_id": "9afdb76d-8252-4152-a95b-dc30e9a10a20",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file2L1-L11",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "The lintel fell harmlessly because the people under it had cleared in that half-breath.\nTiffani didn’t let it become myth. She let it become a list.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 529,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 586,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 33,
                "line_range_start": 4,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file0L4-L33",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Jhace stepped into the middle of the lane where the heat line was strongest. He turned his body so he could see both the burning doorway and the steam pipe.\nHe raised both hands.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 558,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 615,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 3,
                "line_range_end": 33,
                "line_range_start": 9,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file3L9-L33",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "It should have hit the city like an axe.\nIt didn’t.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 587,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 645,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {

                "line_range_end": 44,
                "line_range_start": 38,
                "message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                "message_index": 8
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn8file1L38-L44",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,

              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Chapter 10 — Mobel (The Shard)\nMobel didn’t sit in the center of the room.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 616,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 674,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {

                "line_range_end": 25,
                "line_range_start": 1,
                "message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file3L1-L25",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "The hum tightened.\nTiffani felt it before she could name it. The slack phase did not arrive on schedule.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 646,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,

                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Tiffani hated how effective it was.\nEries turned, finally, toward Corlexi—barely—just enough to include him in her closing.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 675,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 734,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 44,
                "line_range_start": 40,
                "message_id": "2f819583-2aa0-46ed-8632-ac0e24f472aa",
                "message_index": 4
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn4file0L40-L44",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "She didn’t know what would happen next.\nShe only knew this:",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 705,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 951,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 3,
                "line_range_end": 29,
                "line_range_start": 23,
                "message_id": "9afdb76d-8252-4152-a95b-dc30e9a10a20",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file3L23-L29",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "On the plain beyond Saint Merro, something had risen.\nAt first his mind tried to name it small. Wall. Cliff. A terrace collapse out beyond the far districts. Then the scale hit and the name fell apart.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 922,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1167,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 36,
                "line_range_start": 20,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file0L20-L36",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Steam rolled across the lane, white and dense, driven in a low sheet straight into the mouth of the building.\nIt hit the heat and exploded into a wall of scalding fog. The flame inside coughed, then shrank. The orange at the windows dimmed, replaced by gray-white boiling.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1138,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1287,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 1,
                "line_range_end": 29,
                "line_range_start": 20,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file1L20-L29",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Her home had been tucked under that bend. Two rooms. One small window that never opened right. Aunt Lessa’s pot hooks by the stove. A shelf with the chipped bowl they kept even though it was stupid to keep a chipped bowl.\nChloen stared at the bend.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1258,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1548,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 31,
                "line_range_start": 23,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file0L23-L31",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Jhace held his hands out and kept sweeping, smaller motions now, compressing and directing. He wasn’t blowing the fire out. He was smothering it, stripping it of oxygen and drowning it in wet heat.\nHis sternum locked. Breath cut. Vision narrowed.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1519,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1576,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 3,
                "line_range_end": 8,
                "line_range_start": 1,
                "message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file3L1-L8",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "The hum tightened.\nTiffani felt it before she could name it. The slack phase did not arrive on schedule.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1549,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 1831,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 8,
                "line_range_start": 1,
                "message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file0L1-L8",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Guards raised ropes to open lanes. Guards lowered ropes to close lanes.\nCrowds entered by terrace ramps and split at chalk marks into sections. Cloth tabs tied to wrists matched section colors. Red, blue, grey, raw twine.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 1804,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 2043,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 4,
                "line_range_end": 24,
                "line_range_start": 17,
                "message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                "message_index": 8
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn8file4L17-L24",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Tiffani hated how effective it was.\nEries turned, finally, toward Corlexi—barely—just enough to include him in her closing.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 2014,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 2261,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 2,
                "line_range_end": 10,
                "line_range_start": 1,
                "message_id": "9afdb76d-8252-4152-a95b-dc30e9a10a20",
                "message_index": 6
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn6file2L1-L10",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "The lintel fell harmlessly because the people under it had cleared in that half-breath.\nTiffani didn’t let it become myth. She let it become a list.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 2233,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 2462,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 3,
                "line_range_end": 28,
                "line_range_start": 14,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file3L14-L28",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "The leading edge of the wave kinked sideways as if a blade had cut a groove through it. Foam that had been rushing straight at the city snapped into a new vector, sliding along an invisible plane. The whole mass followed—tons of water re-routing as one body, redirected away from the densest district and forced into the open basin to the left where there was stone and scrub and nothing stacked for people to die in.\nSpray erupted where the redirected water scraped over ground. A new roar rolled up the face, late and heavy, vibrating through the parapet and into Jhace’s sternum like a hand pressing to see if he’d learned.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 2433,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 2660,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 3,
                "line_range_end": 22,
                "line_range_start": 13,
                "message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file3L13-L22",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "A worker carrying a crate did not recover.\nHis foot landed on a stone lip that had been stable one beat ago. The lip shifted under the stutter. The crate tilted. His weight followed.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 2631,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 2912,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 1,
                "line_range_end": 44,
                "line_range_start": 38,
                "message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                "message_index": 8
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn8file1L38-L44",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Chapter 10 — Mobel (The Shard)\nMobel didn’t sit in the center of the room.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 2883,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 3098,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 1,
                "line_range_end": 25,
                "line_range_start": 21,
                "message_id": "2f819583-2aa0-46ed-8632-ac0e24f472aa",
                "message_index": 4
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn4file1L21-L25",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Chapter 17 — Tiffani (Deployment)\nCamera (baseline): The stadium held a bowl of bodies. Rope lanes cut the stone flats into corridors. Bell towers at three stations rang cadence through metal throats. Registry tables formed a spine under awnings. Water barrels sat in rows. A thin ash haze drifted and then reversed, as the air pulled and slacked.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 3069,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 3342,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 21,
                "line_range_start": 16,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file0L16-L21",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "A joint on the steam line hissed, venting a thin ribbon upward.\nHe hooked the shove of wind around that ribbon the way you’d redirect a flow in a pipe—curve it, carry it, throw it where it mattered.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 3313,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 3370,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 2,
                "line_range_end": 7,
                "line_range_start": 3,
                "message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file2L3-L7",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Her eyes went immediately to the failure pattern.\nShe traced the break line up with her gaze: façade shear, mortar flow point, post-bend, then fracture. It matched her earlier forecast. Liquefaction, set wrong, then catastrophic shear under its own weight.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 3343,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 3882,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 3,
                "line_range_end": 12,
                "line_range_start": 10,
                "message_id": "457ec9a9-e08c-4185-8f2f-a2d6e059e9d4",
                "message_index": 5
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn5file3L10-L12",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Not an earthquake. Not a ring.\nA discontinuity.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 3853,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 3912,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 0,
                "line_range_end": 31,
                "line_range_start": 23,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file0L23-L31",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Jhace held his hands out and kept sweeping, smaller motions now, compressing and directing. He wasn’t blowing the fire out. He was smothering it, stripping it of oxygen and drowning it in wet heat.\nHis sternum locked. Breath cut. Vision narrowed.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 3883,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 4467,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 3,
                "line_range_end": 33,
                "line_range_start": 24,
                "message_id": "fd2ab541-ef7f-4bbc-9c5f-4ad5fb3a08d6",
                "message_index": 7
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn7file3L24-L33",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Someone down there had done it.\nSomeone had put a hand on a moving ocean and told it no.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 4438,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 4497,
              "fff_metadata": null,
              "id": "file_0000000023fc7230b413bd6905a776b9",
              "input_pointer": {
                "file_index": 4,
                "line_range_end": 24,
                "line_range_start": 23,
                "message_id": "793db5ff-5fb7-41c8-9540-ed148ea5ebc4",
                "message_index": 8
              },
              "matched_text": "fileciteturn8file4L23-L24",
              "medical_file_reference": {
                "authors_display": null,
                "doi": null,
                "journal_homepage_url": null,
                "journal_name": null,
                "publication_year": "None"
              },
              "name": "The Confluence Chronicles (Chapters 1-18 & Epilogue).txt",
              "snippet": "Applause started in the bowl—hesitant, then spreading, because people needed an action that wasn’t screaming.\nTiffani watched the applause become consent.",
              "source": "my_files",
              "start_idx": 4468,
              "type": "file"
            },
            {
              "alt": null,
              "cloud_doc_url": null,
              "connector_id": null,
              "end_idx": 4816,
